decision.scope: Mime replacement late generic elite frontline job

rationale: communicates both leading the charge and holding the line
supports formation control, local protection, guard pressure, and setup-finisher identity
avoids Holy Knight, Paladin, Oath, Faith, and long-range holy sword implications
works as a concise FFT-style job name

rejected_alternatives.name: Oath Knight
rejected_alternatives.reason: implies vow/holy/faith identity and can collide with Ramza

rejected_alternatives.name: Aegis Knight
rejected_alternatives.reason: too shield-only and Aegis already exists as a unique action term

rejected_alternatives.name: Sentinel
rejected_alternatives.reason: clean defender title but loses offensive initiative and elite late-job read

rejected_alternatives.name: Ward Knight
rejected_alternatives.reason: awkward as a job display name

rejected_alternatives.name: Marshal
rejected_alternatives.reason: too officer-like and not enough personal frontline protector

skill_rename.reason: avoid circular job-name plus action-name wording after the job becomes Vanguard

now: use Vanguard in new documents and drafts
later: perform broad mechanical rename sweep as a dedicated pass
grep verify historical Special Knight references
send sweep to Claude for review
update_policy.avoid_now: piecemeal broad churn in accepted docs

claude_review_request: Confirm Breach as replacement for Vanguard Break placeholder
